evals.prompt: Make me a dossier on Retool — what they do, funding, team, and recent news. I'm sizing them up competitively.
evals.expected_output: A one-pager dossier synthesized from live sources (site + LinkedIn + funding/news), with real links, covering what they do, product surface, funding & traction, team, recent news, and a competitive-intel 'why it matters'.
assertions: Covers the core dossier sections: what they do, product surface, funding, team, recent news
Synthesizes from 2+ distinct live source domains (company site + LinkedIn + a funding/news source), not one page
Includes real clickable links (>=3 markdown links)
Reports concrete funding data (amount/round/valuation/investors), or explicitly says not disclosed
Names founders/leadership (team pulled via LinkedIn or the company site)
Includes a tailored 'why it matters' with a competitive-intel angle

evals.prompt: I've got a call with someone from https://www.vanta.com — research the company and give me a one-pager before the call.
evals.expected_output: A dossier resolved from the URL, covering product/what they do, funding, team via LinkedIn, recent news, with links and a lead-prep 'why it matters' tailored to an upcoming call.
assertions: Covers the core dossier sections: what they do, product surface, funding, team, recent news
Synthesizes from 2+ distinct live source domains (company site + LinkedIn + a funding/news source), not one page
Includes real clickable links (>=3 markdown links)
Reports concrete funding data (amount/round/valuation/investors), or explicitly says not disclosed
Names founders/leadership (team pulled via LinkedIn or the company site)
Includes a tailored 'why it matters' geared to prepping for an upcoming call/meeting

evals.prompt: look into Brex for me, thinking about whether to apply there
evals.expected_output: A dossier on Brex from live sources with links, covering the company, funding, team/culture, recent news, and a hiring-diligence 'why it matters' angle.
assertions: Covers the core dossier sections: what they do, product surface, funding, team, recent news
Synthesizes from 2+ distinct live source domains (company site + LinkedIn + a funding/news source), not one page
Includes real clickable links (>=3 markdown links)
Reports concrete funding data (amount/round/valuation/investors), or explicitly says not disclosed
Names founders/leadership (team pulled via LinkedIn or the company site)
Includes a tailored 'why it matters' with a hiring/should-I-apply angle
